weekly picks (Jul 2 week 2026)

Posted on July 13, 2026 in 2026jul,  Daily t.me,  adsabs,  g scholar

A WordCloud of 2026 July 1st week collection

===This week’s pick===

  • Score :
Unfold/Fold

07/16

  1. s41567-026-03369-2 All-mechanical coherence protection and fast control of a spin qubit (Nature Physics)

  2. s41586-026-10709-y Universal gates from braiding and fusing anyons on quantum hardware (Nature)

  3. s41586-026-10782-3 Quantum statistical plasmonic metacrystals (Nature)

  4. s41586-026-10762-7 Fractional high-Chern insulator in twisted rhombohedral graphene (Nature)

  5. s41586-026-10758-3 Magnetic character of the low-energy enhancement in 70Zn (Nature)

  6. d41586-026-02038-x Optical filter sorts light by its ‘quantum statistics’ (Nature)

  7. s41598-026-60944-6 Effect of manufacturing method on metal ion release from orthodontic brackets and tubes (Scientific Reports)

  10. y243-ygbf Kondo Effect in Nonreciprocal Response (PRL)

  11. jg6l-gzfr Nonlinear Odd Viscoelastic Effect (PRL)

  12. tsnc-4jjl Even Denominator Fractional Quantum Hall States in the Zeroth Landau Level of ABA Trilayer Graphene (PRL)
